title: Save Minecraft (Save The Game)
description: A Forge mod that enrolls you into an adventure that makes Minecraft worth playing by rewarding you with the power to rule over the world.
body:
Save The Game Are you bored of Minecraft? Is Minecraft not as fun as before? What if playing it had a purpose, what if you would get the best prize ever as a a reward? Well you're in the right place. Save The Game is a mod that adds a purpose to play Minecraft by adding 5 gems that the player earn by doing certain tasks to progress in a Minecraft world. These gems can be combined into the Godly Power item (which gives you powers to rule over the world) at a structure that only generates in one part of the entire Minecraft world. The 5 gems that make Minecraft unique are: Gem Of Blocks, Gem Of Creativity, Gem Of Friendship, Gem Of Peace and Gem Of Survival. Gem Of Blocks - Obtained by placing more than 5,000 blocks.
Gem Of Creativity - Obtained by placing more than 6,000 blocks, breaking more than 2,000 blocks and using an item more than 1,000 times.
Gem Of Friendship - Obtained by taming any mob that can be tamed like a Wolf.
Gem Of Peace - Obtained by completely defeating a Raid in any village.
Gem Of Survival - Obtained by defeating the Ender Dragon.
All these gems are only obtainable ONCE per world, so don't lose them. Godly Power - Obtained by depositing each gem into its corresponding place inside the Save The Game Structure.
Powers: - When right clicking, it will grant you a ton of positive potion effects (making you invincible) and give you the ability to fly. - When right clicking again (with all the effects), it will remove all the potion effects. - When right clicking while sneaking, it will make you invisible. - When right clicking while sneaking again (with invisibility), it will remove the invisibility effect. - When swinging the item, it will make the item in your first slot to the maximum. (Example: You have 1 dirt block in your first slot of the hotbar, when swinging Godly Power you will now have 64 dirt in your first slot.) - This item does instamine on any block you use it with. - It does not have durability, meaning you can use it forever. - It one-shots almost every single mob in the game. Save The Game Structure - Here you save Minecraft and obtain the Godly Power item. - It only spawns at the coordinates: (0, 250, 0). - It has a pedestal for each gem, throw the gem into it. - The Gem Of Creativity goes in one of the 8 chests, find the correct one!
This mod will receive updates so stay tuned! Also, if this mod gets 1,000 downloads, I'll make a Map with this same idea instead of a mod and publish it in Modrinth, MCPEDL and Curseforge! Made by RoCris
